scripts.pdf: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang all
scripts.pdf:en: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang en
scripts.pdf:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang ko
scripts.pdf:ja: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang ja
scripts.pdf:th: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang th
scripts.pdf:all: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang all
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode sample
scripts.preview:catalog: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode catalog
scripts.preview:doc: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode document --lang en
scripts.preview:doc:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode document --lang ko
scripts.preview:doc:ja: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode document --lang ja
scripts.preview:doc:th: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode document --lang th
scripts.preview:html: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview:html --lang en
scripts.preview:html:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview:html --lang ko
scripts.preview:html:ja: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview:html --lang ja
scripts.preview:html:th: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview:html --lang th
scripts.preview:html:catalog: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview:html --mode catalog
scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang all
scripts.build:web:en: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang en
scripts.build:web:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang ko
scripts.build:web:optimized: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang all --optimize-images
scripts.build:web:en:optimized: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang en --optimize-images
scripts.serve:web: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js serve:web --lang en
scripts.serve:web:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js serve:web --lang ko
scripts.serve:web:ja: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js serve:web --lang ja
